name: luma-agent
description: Local-only Luma invite monitor with strict headless checks and scoped filesystem access

scripts.fetch-invites: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/index.js fetch-invites
scripts.check-events: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/index.js check-events
scripts.summarize: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/index.js summarize
scripts.run-daily: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/index.js run-daily
scripts.auth:gmail: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/index.js auth-gmail
